name: Mexican Corn Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can whole kernel corn (15.25 oz), drained
2 cans chopped green chiles (4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs in a large bowl.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
3. Stir in 2 cups of cheese.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
5. Bake, uncovered, at 325°F for 1 hour.
6. Top with the remaining cheese.
7. Let stand for 15 minutes before serving.
8. Garnish with pepper if desired.
